title: vitis ruyuanensis
intro: Vitis ruyuanensis is a species of grapevine native to China, belonging to the Vitaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis ruyuanensis include potential cardiovascular protection, anti-aging effects, and the ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Vitis ruyuanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
